dashboard.title: Welcome back, {{name}}.
dashboard.subtitle: Here's what's happening with your brand.
dashboard.backend_error: Couldn't reach backend. Make sure it's running on localhost:9000.

websites.title: Websites
websites.subtitle: Build and publish mini-sites for your businesses.
websites.new_subtitle: Give it a name and we'll generate a public URL instantly.
websites.how_body1: After creating, you'll be taken straight to the visual editor. Save your changes and the site goes live at the URL above — no extra steps needed.
websites.how_body2: Anyone with the link can view a Published site. Draft sites show a banner to the owner only.
websites.empty_subtitle: Create your first website and it will be instantly live at a public URL.

designs.title: Business Cards
designs.subtitle: All your cards, in one place.
designs.new_subtitle: Pick one to start, or start from blank
designs.blank_desc: Start with an empty canvas and design from scratch
designs.error: Couldn't load cards. Please try again.
designs.empty_subtitle: Create your first card from a template or start with a blank canvas.

businesses.title: Businesses
businesses.subtitle: Manage every brand under your account.
businesses.new_subtitle: Add a brand. You can later create cards, QR codes and a website for it.
businesses.empty_subtitle: Add your first brand to start creating cards.
businesses.danger_desc: Deleting this business removes all associated designs and websites.

qr.title: QR Codes
qr.subtitle: Generate trackable QR codes for any contact surface.
qr.coming_soon_sub: Generate codes now; backend persistence lands in Phase 2.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Activity across your brands.
analytics.charts_soon_sub: Hook up backend events to populate scans-over-time and traffic charts.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Your plan and payment methods.
billing.payment_sub: Click and Payme for Uzbekistan, Stripe internationally. Activates when backend payment routes are deployed.

landing.subtitle: Cards, QR codes, digital business cards and mini-websites — all from the same JSON canvas engine. Easier than Canva. Built for people who don't have time to design.
landing.section_title: One engine. Every surface your business needs.
landing.section_sub: JSON-based design data powers cards, QR pages, sites, flyers and future products. Edit once, export anywhere.
landing.f1_body: Text, shapes, images, QR, icons. Layers, snapping, undo/redo, multi-page.
landing.f2_body: PNG, JPG, SVG, PDF with bleed. vCard and HTML for digital surfaces.
landing.f3_body: Manage Ali Auto, Ali Construction and Ali Consulting in one account.
